name.description: Indexed director roster (3 inline rows on MNPCA-11) for the FIRST table's 'Directors:' rows. Address is a single-line widget combining street/city/state/zip. Overflow goes to 'List additional directors on reverse side' (no widget binds the overflow page).

address.description: Indexed director roster (3 inline rows on MNPCA-11) for the FIRST table's 'Directors:' rows. Address is a single-line widget combining street/city/state/zip. Overflow goes to 'List additional directors on reverse side' (no widget binds the overflow page).

consent_class.description: Enum capturing which class of constituents executed the written consent attached as Exhibit A: 'members' (when the corporation has voting members) or 'directors_when_no_voting_members' (when there are no members or no members entitled to vote). Mutually exclusive (SECOND).

address_line1.description: Two-line registered office address of a Maine domestic corporation (FOURTH paragraph). Same multi-line pattern as NP_MNPCA-10's merger.surviving_corp.registered_office_address_line{1,2}.

address_line2.description: Two-line registered office address of a Maine domestic corporation (FOURTH paragraph). Same multi-line pattern as NP_MNPCA-10's merger.surviving_corp.registered_office_address_line{1,2}.

clerk_signature_printed_name.description: Printed name (or signature, if the user types it) of the clerk, secretary, or assistant secretary who certifies custody of the minutes showing the member-vote action. Required when dissolution.consent_class='members'; not required when consent_class='directors_when_no_voting_members'. Same primitive family as NP_MNPCA-10's merger.parties[N].clerk_certification.signer_printed_name_and_title.

printed_name_and_capacity.description: Indexed authorized-officer signature slots for filings that provide multiple signature blocks (filing.signer_1.*, filing.signer_2.*, etc.). MNPCA-11 has two slots; only the first is required (per 13-B MRSA §104.1.B). Each slot uses the Shape-D combined-name-and-capacity primitive.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.

name.description: Role-keyed officer roster pattern for nonprofit dissolution: officer_president.{name,address}, officer_treasurer.{name,address}, officer_secretary.{name,address}, officer_clerk.{name,address}. The form's row labels (President, Treasurer, Secretary, Clerk) supply the capacity; the user only enters name and address. Distinct from CORP_MBCA-12's `officer_N.printed_name_and_capacity` (where capacity is user-entered) and from `incorporator_N.*` (formation-only).

address.description: Role-keyed officer roster pattern for nonprofit dissolution: officer_president.{name,address}, officer_treasurer.{name,address}, officer_secretary.{name,address}, officer_clerk.{name,address}.
